summary: Fleet Portal Bookings & Trips Modules Testing Complete. Backend: 36/36 API tests passed (22 existing + 14 new for bookings/trips/dispatch). Frontend: All UI tests passed - Bookings page with 4 reservations, expandable cards, search filter, status filter, refresh button, dispatch form with driver dropdown. Trips page shows empty state correctly. Regression: Drivers and Vehicles pages still working.

issues: React hydration warnings in console due to Emergent preview system wrapper elements injecting <span> into <select>/<option> - cosmetic only, does NOT affect functionality

backend_tests.existing_fleet_tests: 22/22 PASS - All existing fleet portal tests pass
backend_tests.bookings_list_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/fleet/bookings returns array with 4 bookings
backend_tests.dispatch_validation: PASS - Validates payload and proxies to C# API
backend_tests.trips_list_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/fleet/trips returns array (empty for this company)

frontend_tests.fleet_login: PASS - Login with Nandetiri1@gmail.com/12345678 redirects to dashboard
frontend_tests.sidebar_reservations_link: PASS - Found 'Reservations' link in sidebar nav
frontend_tests.sidebar_courses_link: PASS - Found 'Courses' link in sidebar nav
frontend_tests.booking_card_expand: PASS - Clicking booking card expands to show details
frontend_tests.booking_detail_driver: PASS - Shows 'Non affecte' for bookings without driver
frontend_tests.dispatch_form: PASS - Clicking dispatch button shows form with driver dropdown
frontend_tests.dispatch_driver_select: PASS - data-testid='dispatch-driver-select-16' with 2 options (placeholder + 1 active driver)
frontend_tests.trips_empty_state: PASS - Shows 'Aucune course' empty state message

verified_features: Fleet Login: Email/password form works with test credentials
Navigation Sidebar: Shows 'Reservations' and 'Courses' menu items
Bookings Page: Lists 4 reservations with expandable card layout
Booking Card: Shows status (Nouvelle), car type, addresses, date, price
Booking Expand: Click to expand reveals client info, driver status, trip type
Dispatch Button: Appears for 'New' bookings without driver assigned
Dispatch Form: Driver selection dropdown with active drivers from company
Search Filter: Filter bookings by address or client name
Status Filter: Dropdown to filter by status (Tous les statuts, New, etc.)
Refresh Button: 'Actualiser' button to reload bookings data
Trips Page: Shows trips list (empty state for this company)
Trips Search: Filter trips by address, driver, client
Trips Refresh: 'Actualiser' button to reload trips data
Backend GET /api/fleet/bookings: Returns booking data with pagination
Backend GET /api/fleet/bookings/count: Returns count
Backend POST /api/fleet/bookings/dispatch: Validates driverId + auctionId required
Backend GET /api/fleet/trips: Returns trip data (empty array)
Backend GET /api/fleet/trips/count: Returns count
REGRESSION: Drivers page with add button still works
REGRESSION: Vehicles page with add button still works
critical_code_review_comments: FleetBookings.js correctly implements expandable card layout with dispatch form
Dispatch form only shows for 'New' status bookings without driver (correct business logic)
Driver dropdown correctly filters to show only activeDrivers (isActivated=true)
FleetTrips.js correctly handles empty state with 'Aucune course' message
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Backend endpoints correctly proxy to C# API with token authentication
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fleet portal Bookings & Trips modules fully tested. DO NOT actually dispatch a driver to a real booking as it will affect C# production data. Test dispatch UI only (form appearance, dropdown validation). The bookings list uses expandable card layout - click to expand. For 'New' status bookings without driver, dispatch button appears in expanded view. React hydration warnings are from Emergent preview wrapper - cosmetic only.

mocked_api.note: All Fleet APIs proxy to real C# backend at https://api.zont.cab - no mocked data
